title: justicia subalternans
intro: Justicia subalternans, also known as Kalmegh or Indian Tinospora, is a plant species native to tropical Asia, used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant contains compounds with anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiviral properties, which are believed to be responsible for its medicinal effects. The health benefits of Justicia subalternans include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy in Ayurvedic medicine. Herbal preparations of Justicia subalternans typically involve drying and processing the leaves and roots, which can be made into teas, infusions, or capsules for consumption.
